title: croton pungens
intro: Croton pungens, also known as the Toothache Tree, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating toothaches, sore throats, and other mouth and throat irritations. The plant's leaves and bark contain a compound called tannin, which is responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal preparations, Croton pungens is often used to make teas, tinctures, and poultices to relieve pain and reduce inflammation.
